canonical_definition: An automatic dataset generator for ambiguous and unanswerable questions in semantic parsing, producing annotated tests across six categories: Column Ambiguity, Scope, Attachment, Column Unanswerable, Calculation Unanswerable, and Out-of-Scope.
papers: VeriFact: Enhancing Long-Form Factuality Evaluation with Refined Fact Extraction and Reference Facts

definitions.text: An automatic dataset generator for ambiguous and unanswerable questions in semantic parsing, producing annotated tests across six categories: Column Ambiguity, Scope, Attachment, Column Unanswerable, Calculation Unanswerable, and Out-of-Scope.
definitions.paper: VeriFact: Enhancing Long-Form Factuality Evaluation with Refined Fact Extraction and Reference Facts

characterization: An automatic dataset generator for ambiguous and unanswerable questions in semantic parsing, producing annotated tests across six categories: Column Ambiguity, Scope, Attachment, Column Unanswerable, Calculation Unanswerable, and Out-of-Scope.
